flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at California State University-Northridge fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (81.8% → 73.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State University-Northridge fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California State University-Northridge rose 68% between 2021 and 2024 (16.6% → 27.8%).
